hero.title: AURA PREMIUM STUDIOS
hero.subtitle: Premium Rooms & Serviced Studios - Luxury Living In District 1

overview.title: Aura Premium Experience
overview.subtitle: A new generation of premium rooms and serviced studios for rent in the financial district, where minimalist design meets modern conveniences.
overview.greenSpaceVal: Room cleaning 2x/week, Free Wifi & Pool Access

handover.title: Room Handover Amenities
handover.subtitle: Each room is fully equipped with premium smart furniture, optimizing space. Just bring your suitcase and move in.

kitchen.title: Convenient Kitchenette
kitchen.desc: Oak cabinets, premium Bosch induction hob, built-in smart fridge, and automatic cooker hood.

smartHome.title: Smart Controls
smartHome.desc: Daikin smart central air conditioning, secure fingerprint & keycard lock, and electric motorized curtains.

bathroom.title: High-class Private Bathroom
bathroom.desc: Fully equipped with a standing glass shower stall, premium Toto chrome-plated fittings, and a Ferroli water heater.

flooring.title: Sound-absorbing Hardwood
flooring.desc: 12mm water-resistant laminate flooring imported from Malaysia, effectively reducing noise transmission between floors.

gallery.title: Real Living Spaces
gallery.subtitle: Explore real captures of our studios and shared upscale amenities at Aura Premium Studios.

contact.title: Register to Book a Room Viewing
contact.subtitle: Leave your contact details, and our Property Manager will call to assist you in selecting a room and scheduling a viewing.
contact.name: Full Name
contact.success: Registration successful! The Property Manager will contact you shortly to schedule a viewing.

products.title: Available Rooms & Studios
products.subtitle: Select a refined living space optimized for working professionals and young families.

cozy-studio.name: Cozy Studio
cozy-studio.tagline: Minimalist and neat for active modern lifestyles
cozy-studio.viewVal: Quiet inner courtyard with lush green trees
cozy-studio.handoverHighlight: Fully furnished bed, wardrobe, working desk, mini fridge, single induction hob.

loft-suite.name: Loft Suite
loft-suite.tagline: Smart loft design doubling your living area
loft-suite.viewVal: Saigon financial district glittering night lights
loft-suite.handoverHighlight: Living area with sofa downstairs, private sleeping loft upstairs, full-sized fridge.

executive-1br.name: Executive 1BR
executive-1br.viewVal: Facing directly towards the poetic Saigon River
executive-1br.handoverHighlight: Includes laundry service, weekly deep cleaning, modern L-shaped kitchen.

penthouse-studio.name: Penthouse Studio
penthouse-studio.tagline: Spacious penthouse studio with a private rooftop garden
penthouse-studio.viewVal: 360-degree panoramic view overlooking the city skyline
penthouse-studio.handoverHighlight: Private sunbathing deck on a large balcony, premium bathtub.
